detail.description: The ultimate anime action RPG is here! DRAGON BALL LEGENDS puts the power of your favorite DRAGON BALL heroes in your hands! Epic 3D visuals and animations bring your heroes to life: More than 400 fighters to find and train to make your ultimate team ready for battle. Goku, Vegeta, Trunks, Piccolo, Frieza, Broly, Majin Buu and many other heroes and villains are waiting for you! Discover a new original story based on the brand-new character designed by manga creator Akira Toriyama, the mysterious
detail.recentChanges:
A major update for the 8th anniversary!
・Mission Plan overhaul!
All Mission Plans up to now have been combined, and a new Premium Plan is here! Complete Missions to get Chrono Crystals and various other rewards!
・Also adjusted various UI elements
